description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Granmix Granola, featuring a predominantly white background with bold orange and gray text. The front displays the Granmix brand name in large orange letters, with a close-up image of granola, nuts, and berries in a bowl at the bottom. The back provides product information, usage suggestions, and serving ideas, all in Spanish, with additional images of granola. The sides include nutritional information, ingredients, and contact details, with orange accents and smaller text. The box is sealed and designed for retail sale, with a net weight of 270g indicated on the front. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a focus on natural ingredients and health.
description: A rectangular Granmix Granola cardboard box with white and orange branding, featuring a bowl of granola on the front and detailed product information on the back and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Granmix brand, product name, a bowl of granola, and net weight in orange and gray on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional facts, ingredients, and contact information in orange and gray text.
description_view_2: Back view with product description, serving suggestions, and additional images of granola, all in Spanish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal text, mainly the Granmix logo and a small orange label at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The Granmix brand logo is prominently displayed on the front, back, and both sides of the box in bold orange uppercase letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and back text indicate 'semillas y nueces' (seeds and nuts) as the flavor, with supporting imagery of granola, seeds, and nuts.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the side panel, including a nutrition facts table and ingredient list.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A circular orange badge on the front reads 'HIPER CROCRANTE' (super crunchy), serving as a promotional highlight.
